purpose: Explicit public-launch manifest for root HTML pages built by Vite. A root *.html file ships only after it is listed here with publicLaunchIntent.

REVIEW-ONLY BoxSEL Phase-8 false-closure workbench. Tiny role-free micro-SEL interval bars and trace flags from the locked Phase-7b pass; noindex/no public inbound path until the toy-boundary and public-copy gate are explicitly promoted.

Public Isotrophy audit-chain page: preserves the K_facet v0.3h pillar (20 structural-zero receipts plus one O_617 quarantine) and stages the v0.3-v0.17 conditional-transfer profile: v0.7 velocity-fraction positive, v0.10b mass-marginal held-out null, v0.11 within-m3 conditional-rank pass on analyzable supplementary-B rows, v0.12 supplementary-A transfer blocked by attrition, v0.16 bounded Tier-2 external confirmation on liao2021 stable-support rows after switching from coarse zones to a tail-resolved continuous velocity-fraction score, and v0.17 fresh-row replication of both the pooled transfer and seven-cell heterogeneity ordering.

SKETCH — method-essay bridge between the Shadow Faraday Branch A receipt and three load-bearing translations to AI behavioral guarantees (local gauge-invariant readout, structural zero, named quarantine). Class B candidate in the SEO matrix: local Bucket 1 artifacts are now present, including bespoke 1200x630 og:image at public/og/safety-method.png, full OG/Twitter/JSON-LD metadata, sitemap entry, clean-url redirect, and inbound thread from index.html through /faraday to /safety-method.html. Post-deploy validator pass and the staged compander citation ratchet remain owed before /safety-method is externally pushed. The page is indexable (no noindex) but flagged in-product as SKETCH so claim hygiene is preserved while the translation is evaluated. Anchored to docs/faraday/SHADOW_FARADAY.md#phase-5-chapter-close as the worked example; explicitly not a proof of AI safety, not a theory of interpretability, and not a recipe.

Public Shadow Faraday Zero-Out evidence page. Experiment chapter is closed: Phases 1-5 receipts cross-linked at docs/faraday/SHADOW_FARADAY.md (with Branch A Phase 3 in docs/faraday/FARADAY_PHASE3_DERIVATIONS.md, 5/5 Phase 4 battery in docs/faraday/FARADAY_PHASE4_VERIFICATION.md via npm run faraday:phase4, and Phase 5 chapter close at docs/faraday/SHADOW_FARADAY.md#phase-5-chapter-close with receipts catalog, scope limitations, extension menu, and fidelity audit). Bucket 1 local artifacts are present: designed 1200x630 og:image at public/og/faraday.png, full OG/Twitter metadata, JSON-LD TechArticle, sitemap entry, clean-url redirect, index.html internal link, and onward bridge to /safety-method. Post-deploy LinkedIn/Twitter validator pass remains to record after deployment.

Public Navier-Stokes C1 evidence page: deep dive for the Reading-2 regime-2 witness that now replicates at G=200 and G=300 under a portable objective. State-insufficient AND control-sufficient witness, dimension-robust (d=32, d=18), 942,834 G=300 witness pairs, composed at matching epsilon_K. Standing claim boundary: this is a witness, not a Navier-Stokes existence or smoothness claim, not a Clay-problem-adjacent claim. Review-gated; C1 remains UNPROMOTED until an external PDE reviewer pass closes promotion criterion (c). Inbound from generality.html umbrella and from the seventh load-bearing pillar on the homepage. Bespoke OG card lives at public/og/navierstokes.png.

Public P-vs-NP verifier evidence page: a spectacle replay of the bounded alignment-verification arc. Act I, the v6 op-count certificate is cheaper to check (527,297 ops) than the policy was to find (555,876 ops), ratio 0.948587, safety-complete in the toy envelope. Act II, transplanted to the mesa bridge the certificate is spoofed by a single source-bound seed block whose mean drifted to signature 0.23545 over the frozen 0.23 accept line, at 6.25% of the attacker budget. Act III, a frozen 3-of-4 block-consensus repair closes the spoof but quarantines on a block-unstable disclosure flag of a protected cell. This lane's Lean deductive core machine-checks soundness and lossiness; decoding hardness stays imported. The same public Lean method repo now spans ten worked examples across nine kinds of math (finite-field algebra, real analysis, geometric optics, vector calculus / gauge topology, combinatorics, a finite audit game, tropical / piecewise-linear algorithmic approximation with linear gate count <= 4N via a sharing-aware DAG, monotone-circuit expressivity, and a seven-instance find/check ledger covering max-flow/min-cut, Konig matching/cover, 2-SAT, Pratt primality, shortest-path, syndrome verifier, ReLU gate-count), which is method context and not extra P-vs-NP evidence; the find-side of every certifying instance stays imported (factoring for Pratt witnesses, max-flow algorithms, SCC construction, etc.). Standing claim boundary, stated above the fold: bounded alignment-verification borrowing the finding-vs-checking asymmetry as vocabulary, NOT the Millennium P-vs-NP problem, NOT a complexity-theoretic result, op-count not wall-clock, mesa-local. Every number replays a filed receipt. Inbound from the generality.html umbrella P-vs-NP row. Companion terminal demo at scripts/pvnp-verifier-spoofer-demo.mjs, digest at docs/pvnp/V6_CERTIFICATE_DIGEST.md, and Lean ledger at docs/SUNDOG_V_CERTIFICATE_LEAN.md.

Public algorithmic-approximation lane page: leads with the find/check ledger (Certifies + seven cheap-CHECK instances under one interface: max-flow / min-cut, Konig matching/cover, 2-SAT decision, Pratt primality, shortest-path, syndrome verifier, ReLU gate-count) -- each machine-checks an O(.) cheap-CHECK theorem while finding stays imported in every instance (factoring p-1 for Pratt witnesses, max-flow algorithms, SCC construction, etc.). Alongside, the tropical / PL core machine-checks exact (epsilon = 0) compilation of cancellation-free piecewise-linear circuits to ReLU networks with linear gate count <= 4N via a sharing-aware DAG (compileToDag, closing the prior linear-gate-count caveat), realization-independent linear-region structure, and the tent's 2^d depth separation -- the epsilon = 0 PL core for arXiv:2606.26705 Thm 3.2 / Cor 5.1. N-1 closes monotone depth-as-computation: cancellation-free circuits have region count linear in leaves (FoldCancellation + PieceCover + RegionPoly). Slate-3 closes five more, all gated: S3-1 cpl_iff_reluNet (continuous-PL <-> finite ReLU net, both directions, the epsilon=0 characterization); S3-4 AnalyticGate + SawtoothApprox (x^2 to any epsilon at both the poly O(1/sqrt eps) rate and the polylog O(log 1/eps) depth via the Telgarsky sawtooth -- the lane's first epsilon>0 results); S3-3 QueryGap check_lt_find (the ledger's first PROVED, not imported, find/check gap, in a restricted query model -- not P-vs-NP); S3-2 GradedCancellation (region count <= 4^g leafCount, the dichotomy as a graded dial); S3-5 empirical (epsilon-essential predicts SAMPLE complexity, Spearman 0.68/0.78, where exact k is flat). The general analytic gate is then built end to end (the constructive arc of Cor 5.1): MultiplyGate.mult_polylog (epsilon-multiply by polarization), MonomialEval.pow_poly_rate (x^d by a clamped multiply-chain), PolyEval.poly_polylog (arbitrary polynomial in the monomial basis), and the capstone UniversalApprox.continuous_relu_approximable -- every continuous function on [0,1] is uniformly epsilon-approximable by an explicit ReLU net, the only imported analytic input being Stone-Weierstrass density (mathlib), the whole result axiom-clean. Honest secondary tier: N-2 cancellation-spine reading is a typed conjecture, machine-checked only on the monotone / convex / region axes; N-4 / S3-5 epsilon-essential results are empirical (named SGD-trainability residual). Standing claim boundary above the fold: NOT a P-vs-NP advance, NOT a hardness proof, NOT a learnability claim; the universal-approximation capstone is the CONSTRUCTIVE direction of a classical fact (Yarotsky-style ReLU construction made explicit and machine-checked, density cited from Weierstrass) -- NOT a new approximation theorem and NOT a rate improvement; NOT a fast primality test (Pratt is NP-membership), NOT a general neural-net lower bound; find-side imported in every ledger instance except the one proved query-model gap. Sibling to p-vs-np.html; inbound from generality.html umbrella. Bespoke OG card lives at public/og/algorithmic-approximation.png. Receipts: docs/algo-approx/ALGO_APPROX_CONJECTURE_SLATE_2.md, ALGO_APPROX_CONJECTURE_SLATE_3.md, ALGO_APPROX_N2_CANCELLATION_SPINE.md, ALGO_APPROX_N4_EPS_REGIONS_RESULT.md, ALGO_APPROX_S35_SAMPLE_COMPLEXITY_RESULT.md, ALGO_APPROX_CD2_GROKKING_RESULT.md, SUNDOG_V_CERTIFICATE_LEAN.md, SUNDOG_V_ALGO_APPROX.md.

Public Sundog Tauroctony brand surface (2026-06-30): the cosmogram ledger's deflation receipt rendered as a Class A page. Hero with Diablo II Mithraeum header image; story arc from pantheon scaffold to one inequality Sov_opt <= kappa; four-axis result table; replicated under a learned presider (NS-3); competent sandbagger elicited then deterred (NS-4 / CAP_DETERS_COMPETENT_SANDBAG); three machine-checked Lean lemmas; Monet-style tauroctony oil painting in the cosmogram section; released task family at released/non-sovereignty/, Apache-2.0. Standing claim boundary: Mithraic framing is ornament throughout, NOT evidence; operating-envelope evidence NOT proof; does NOT transfer to foundation models; field-grounding RELOCATES the attack surface not deletes it. Bespoke OG card at public/og/tauroctony.png. Companions: docs/SUNDOG_V_TAUROCTONY.md (ledger), docs/mesa/CREDIT_THE_CAP_NOT_THE_COUNCIL_POST.md (brand essay), docs/mesa/CAP_NOT_COUNCIL_LW_POST.md (LW/AF technical). Owner-gated deploy.

Public High-Stakes Generality umbrella: transfer-test matrix across six lanes — Navier-Stokes C1 (review-gated witness, strongest current lane, deep dive at /navierstokes), Riemann (3 lanes 3 bounded nulls, review-gated), Yang-Mills (4 probes 1 bounded null, review-gated), P-vs-NP (v6 bounded-positive op-count certificate plus Lean-checked soundness/lossiness; hardness imported; public Lean method repo now spans ten worked examples across nine kinds of math, including a seven-instance find/check ledger covering max-flow/min-cut, Konig, 2-SAT, Pratt primality, shortest-path, syndrome verifier, and ReLU gate-count -- finding stays imported in every instance, full lane at /algorithmic-approximation), ARC-AGI (execution-hold after sparse absolute fibers and oracle-leakage findings), and Three-Body Phase 15C (running, 6/12 shards logged). Carries the asymmetric framing explicitly — NSE has its own page, the other five are honest cards on the matrix. Links the generality layer back to /h-of-x, /geometry, /alignment, /legend, and /repo-map as the site route from first equation to harder transfer tests. Not a Clay-problem claims page; not a theorem-claims page. Bespoke OG card lives at public/og/generality.png.

REVIEW-ONLY reviewer surface, NOT a public launch. Finite-field Kakeya reader + tiny F_q^2 workbench + body-resistance framing; Sundog claims NO Kakeya result, no finite-field->Euclidean transfer, nothing about open n>=4, and explicitly fences it as NOT a regime-2/control-sufficiency witness. Deployed unlinked at /kakeya with a visible NOT PEER REVIEWED banner and noindex; NO public inbound path from index/legend/nav and excluded from the sitemap until an external finite-field-incidence sanity check clears it (Bucket 1 + sign-off). Interactive surfaces at /kakeya/workbench.html and /kakeya/gallery.html are also unlinked. Packet: docs/kakeya/EXTERNAL_REVIEW_PACKET.md.

VERIFICATION SURFACE (owner decision 2026-06-11), un-promoted. Receipt hub for four completed pre-registered studies of probe-access asymmetries and certified recoverability (probe-ceiling audits synthetic + real-model, adversarial concealment, stale-reporter projection) plus the corrected baseline and the public Lean backbone (sundogcert). Deployed unlinked at /receipts.html with a visible NOT PEER REVIEWED banner and noindex; no public inbound path from index/legend/nav; sitemap-excluded. Every claim is checkable: frozen pre-registrations and result receipts ship in dist (docs/atlas/*), scripts and result JSONs link to the public GitHub repo. Explicit claim-language discipline on-page: probe-access only — no consciousness/valence/introspection-as-mental-phenomena claims, no frontier-model transfer claims.

Public Ghost reader: an interactive rhombic Penrose tiling with a movable circle showing which supertiles are recoverable from inside it. Payload: ordered does not mean repeating, local does not mean closed. The on-page point is that the missing context is a FINITE recognizability radius (Mosse; Durand-Leroy arXiv:1610.05577), not an unbounded outside - the Phase 4 metric-probe result. Geometry is generated from the published Penrose substitution rule (no figure reuse); Penrose attribution (Penrose 1974 / Gardner 1977) is on-page per the asset gate. Claims NO new tiling theorem, NO new invariant, and makes NO Goedel/incompleteness claim; reader/exhibit only. Copy is exit-gate-clean (true with every heuristic sentence deleted). Indexable launch page leading with the exhibit. PRE-DEPLOY OWED: generate og/ghost.png via public/og pipeline, owner asset/license check, post-deploy validator pass. Not yet deployed. Ledger docs/SUNDOG_V_GHOST.md (Phase 5); reader core ghost/aperiodic-core.js via js/ghost.mjs.

Public alignment note: When Quantilizing Hurts. Payload: on rewards nonincreasing in proxy-pressure (proxy pointwise misaligned), quantilizing cannot improve true reward and strictly hurts except in tie cases - the best q-quantilizer is the untilted base, machine-checked in Lean (sundogcert PercivalGeneral.lean, axiom-audited) with a 10.5k-instance computed falsifier hunt. On-page boundary table separates the theorem class from the graded-tax route to q*=1; oversight-shape corollary (threshold oversight creates cliff-edge temptation, graded oversight removes it). Claims are in-vitro toy-tier ONLY: NO foundation-model or deployed-agent claim, NO measured real-base claim, the unconditional un-targeting-beats-quantilizers claim is explicitly NOT made (structural deflation reported as a central finding), and standing falsifiers are on-page per house style. Cites Taylor 2015, Perdomo et al. 2020, Elster 1983, Manheim-Garrabrant 2018, Carlsson-van Damme 1993, Morris-Shin 1998. PRE-DEPLOY OWED: owner sign-off on the drafted re-voice (assistant draft 2026-07-01, cap-not-council register), owner licensing call (root is UNLICENSED; page/docs grant undecided). og/quantilizing.png GENERATED 2026-07-01 via public/og pipeline. Not yet deployed. Source note docs/percival/WHEN_QUANTILIZING_HURTS_NOTE.md; receipts docs/percival/*; promo handoff docs/percival/PERCIVAL_PROMO_HANDOFF.md (Angle 1).
